configuration.cannotSaveDetails: There was an error trying to save configuration to the server. Please reload the page or try again later.

extensions.toConfigureCaption: Select the extension for which you want to configure 4SEF behavior.
extensions.processModeCaption: How 4SEF should process non-SEF URLs for that component into SEF. Normal and Use Joomla SEF store URLs into the database. All features are available in these modes. Bypass lets the Joomla SEF system handle the URL, and will not store it. Leave as non-sef prevents a SEF to be created entirely. No URL customization is possible with either two last options.
extensions.processModeJoomlaSefWithMenuCaption: If set to Yes and Process Mode is set to Use Joomla SEF, the alias of the menu item associated with the URL will be inserted at the start of the URL. This is similar to selecting Use router.php with menu item in sh404SEF By component configuration tab.
extensions.prefixCaption: A fixed prefix to any SEF URL created by 4SEF for the currently selected extension.
extensions.urlSegmentSpec: Include regular letters and numbers. Do not start or end with a slash.
extensions.contentUseTitleAliasCaption: Set to Yes to use the title alias instead of the title in URLs.
extensions.contentUseCategoryAliasCaption: If set to Yes, 4SEF will use a category alias instead of its actual name every time that name is required to build a url.
extensions.contentIncludeContentCatCaption: Which categories should be included in an individual item URL.
extensions.contentIncludeContentCatCategoriesCaptio: Which categories should be included in categories URLs.
extensions.contentContentCategoriesSuffixCaption: Suffix used to distinguish between regular category link and a "List all categories" link. The latter will have this suffix added.
extensions.contentSlugForUncategorizedContentCaptio:
Urls for uncategorized items will either include only the item title/alias, or be prepended with the menu item title.
It is recommended to use the default value, Use item title, to avoid duplicate content that may be created when inserting a menu item title in a url.
extensions.contentInsertContentTableNameCaption: If set to Yes, the menu element title leading to a list of articles in a category will be prepended to its SEF URL. This allow segragating table display from blog displays.
extensions.contentContentTableNameCaption: When the previous parameter is set to Yes, you can override the text inserted in the SEF URL here. Note that this text will be invariant, and will not be translated for instance.
extensions.contentInsertContentBlogNameCaption: If set to Yes, the menu element title leading to a blog of articles (category or section) will be prepended to its SEF URL. This allow segregating table displays from blog displays.
extensions.contentContentBlogNameCaption: When the previous parameter is set to Yes, you can override the text inserted in the SEF URL here. Note that this text will be invariant, and will not be translated for instance.
extensions.contentContentTitleInsertArticleIdCaptio: If set to Yes, an article internal id will be appended to the title of that article in URLs, in order to be sure each article can be accessed individually, even if 2 articles have the exact same titles, or titles that yields the same URL (after being cleaned up for invalid characters and such). This id will bring no SEO value, and you should rather make sure you do not have articles with the same title in the same category.
extensions.contentContentTitleInsertArticleIdBefore: Insert id at start of article name
extensions.contentInsertIdCatListCaption: Numerical id will be inserted in SEF URLs of content elements from the categories listed here.
extensions.contentInsertNumericalIdCaption: If set to Yes, an article internal id will be appended to the title of that article in URLs, in order to be sure each article can be accessed individually, even if 2 articles have the exact same titles, or titles that yields the same URL (after being cleaned up for invalid characters and such). This id will bring no SEO value, and you should rather make sure you do not have articles with the same title in the same category.
extensions.contentMultipagesTitleCaption:
If set to Yes, for multi-pages article (those with a Table of content), 4SEF will use the page titles inserted using the Page break command : <hr class="system-pagebreak" title="Next_Page_Title" alt="Alternate description"/>, instead of the page number.
For instance, a SEF URL similar to www.mysite.com/user-documentation/Page-2.html will now be replaced by www.mysite.com/user-documentation/Getting-started-with-4sef.html.
extensions.contentInsertDateCaption: If set to Yes, the article creation date will be prepended to the URL (formatted as /YYYY/MM/DD/rest-of-url). This is not a recommended feature as it does not provide any semantic value and can make content harder to manage. It can be used to preserve compatiblity with past URLs.
extensions.contentInsertDateCatListCaption: The date will be inserted in SEF URLs of content elements from the categories listed here.
extensions.contactUseContactCatAliasCaption: If set to Yes, 4SEF will use a category alias instead of its actual name every time that name is required to build a url
extensions.virtuemartInsertShopNameCaption: If set to Yes, shop name (as defined by shop menu item title) will allways be prepended to SEF URL.
extensions.virtuemartUseMenuItemsCaption: If set to No, 4SEF will create when possible products details links that are independent of menu items.
extensions.virtuemartWhichProductDetailsCatCaption: If 'Use menu items' is set to No, select how product categories must be included in links to products pages.

dashboard.banner: Welcome to 4SEF! View our Getting Started video for a quick tour
dashboard.contactSupport: Please check log files or contact support for help.
dashboard.canImportFromSh404sef: 4SEF has detected that sh404SEF is or was installed on this site. 4SEF can import URLs and configuration from sh404SEF. Use the Import from sh404SEF button on the SEF URLs page to do so.

routing.enabledCaption: When set to Yes, 4SEF will take over SEF url generation from Joomla! This will happen regardless of the SEF setting found under Joomla!'s Global configuration panel.
routing.spacerCaption: Character to use to replace unknown characters in URL.
routing.spacerSpec: A single character, no / \ ? . + or space.
routing.toStripCaption: Any character listed here will be stripped from generated URLs.
routing.replacementsCaption:
You can set some characters to be replaced in generated URLs per this replacement table.
Format is xxx | yyy for each replacement rule. xxx is the character to be replaced, whereas yyy is the new character.
Note also that xxx or yyy can be multiple characters, such as in Å’|oe.
routing.replacementsSpec: List pairs separated with a |. Separate pairs with a ,
routing.toTrimCaption: Any character listed here will be trimmed from the start and end of generated URLs.
routing.lowerCaseCaption: Convert all characters to lowercase in the generated URLs.
routing.suffixCaption: File suffix to use for single pages (ie not categories). Leave blank to disable. A common entry here is .html.
routing.j3SefSuffixWarning: On Joomla! 3, if you use any other suffix than .html, you must set Joomla own Add suffix to URL setting to No in Joomla's global configuration.
routing.useMenuAliasCaption: If set to Yes, 4SEF will use a menu item alias instead of its actual title every time that title is required to build a url.
routing.feedsSafeModeCaption: If enabled, category feeds URLs will use query string variables (/category/?format=feed&type=rss) instead of the usual path segments (/category/feed/rss/). This may be required depending on your site setup or if you manually customize categories URLs.
routing.sh404sefExecuteShurlsCaption: If enabled and the {prefix}_forsef_legacy_pageids table is found in the database, 4SEF will execute the short URLs redirects created by sh404SEF, a discontinued legacy extension. This database table can be obtained from the sh404SEF database table, {prefix}_sh404sef_pageids. Either rename the sh404SEF table to {prefix}_forsef_legacy_pageids, or copy its content into {prefix}_forsef_legacy_pageids.

pagination.spacerCaption: Character to use to space page numbers away from the rest of the URL.
pagination.spacerSpec: A single character, no / \ ? . + or space.
pagination.patternsCaption: Define a pagination pattern for each language used on the site. A pattern is a small text, such as page-%s, seite-%s or p-%s. The %s code indicates where the page number will be inserted automatically.
pagination.slugsPatternsSpec: Must include %s which is where the page number will be inserted. No /.
pagination.alwaysAppendItemsPerPageCaption: If set to Yes, 4SEF will always append the number of items per page to paginated urls. For instance, .../Page-2.html will become .../Page-2-10.html, if the current settings cause 10 items to be displayed per page. This is required for instance if you let your users select a number of items per page.

systemConfiguration.loggingLevelCaption: Select how much details should be included in logs.
systemConfiguration.loggingLevelsWarningDetails: This can store a lot of data if left enabled for too long. Change this under Configuration | System.
systemConfiguration.themeCaption: Pick a light or dark global color theme.
systemConfiguration.accentColorCaption: Pick the main color used to accentuate important information.
systemConfiguration.expandHelpSystemEnabled: Help texts and buttons are displayed
systemConfiguration.expandHelpSystemCaption: If enabled, short help texts and full help buttons will be displayed next to each configuration option. If disabled, only a small icon is shown.
systemConfiguration.uninstallRemoveAllDataCaption: If enabled, all information stored by 4SEF to the database, including page data and any configuration, will be removed if you uninstall 4SEF. This cannot be reverted. No data will be removed immediately.
systemConfiguration.uninstallRemoveAllDataEnabled: All data will be removed when uninstalling
systemConfiguration.uninstallRemoveAllDataDisabled: Data will not be removed when uninstalling
systemConfiguration.deleteAllDataConfirmed: Next time 4SEF is uninstalled, all data stored in the database, including all configuration, will be deleted.
systemConfiguration.updateKeyCaption: Enter your update key to allow one-click updates using the Joomla! updater.
systemConfiguration.updateKeyObtain: Get this key from your Weeblr.com dashboard.
systemConfiguration.purgeErrorsAfterCaption: Choose how long error records will be kept before automatic deletion.
systemConfiguration.resetRemindersCaption: Click this button so that all messages where you pressed the "Remind me later" button are reset and displayed again.
systemConfiguration.canAutoClearNotificationsCaption: If set to Yes, pop-up notifications such as error or confirmation messages will disappear after a delay. You can still use the Pause button in the notification to stop the automatic closing.

ui.confirmBeforeCloseHelp: There are some unsaved changes, they will be lost if you close without saving.

help.helpOptions: And to go further, use these resources...

configWizard.enabledWarning: When enabled, 4SEF changes your website URLs compared to the Joomla ones. Please read our documentation about what it means.
configWizard.enableWantToEnable: Do you want to enable 4SEF now?
configWizard.enableWantToDisable: Do you want to disable 4SEF now and check your site first?
configWizard.thankYouEnabled: 4SEF is now handling SEF URLs creation on the site.
configWizard.thankYouDisabled: 4SEF does not handle yet URLs on your site. You need to enable it from the Configuration | Main page before it has any effect.
configWizard.closeLabel: Close wizard and go to dashboard.

importWizard.promptImportUrlsText:
4SEF has detected that sh404SEF is or was installed on this site.
%1 URL(s) exist(s) in total
importWizard.promptImportConfigText: 4SEF has detected that sh404SEF is or was installed on this site. 4SEF can import the relevant configuration options
importWizard.wantToImportUrls: Do you want to import them into 4SEF?
importWizard.wantToImportConfig: Do you want to import this configuration into 4SEF?
importWizard.explainBeforeSh404sefDisabled: sh404SEF will be disabled if it is running on the site
importWizard.explainBeforeImportAll: All URLs, custom and automatically created, will be imported
importWizard.explainBeforeConfig: sh404SEF configuration will be converted when applicable
importWizard.explainBeforeClearDb: Current automatically generated SEF URLs in 4SEF will be deleted
importWizard.explainBeforeClearDbAll: All current SEF URLs in 4SEF will be deleted, automatic and custom
importWizard.explainBeforeQuestion: Do you want to proceed with the import?
importWizard.finalNoImport: Import cancelled, neither configuration nor custom URLs were imported
importWizard.finalAborted: Import aborted mid-way, configuration or custom URLs may have been imported entirely or partially. You should reset configuration and start over
importWizard.finalRunLater: You can run this importer again using the Import from sh404SEF toolbar button on the SEF URLs page
importWizard.finalStillOffline:
The site is still offline.
Make sure all links are working as expected, then set the site back online using Joomla global configuration.
importWizard.finalMetaAliasesImport: No meta data, redirect or canonical has been imported as 4SEF does not manage these. Please use 4SEO to import them
importWizard.importHasErrors: There were some errors during import. Please consult the import log file in Joomla logs folder for details of what happened.
importWizard.configNotFound: sh404SEF configuration not found. Configuration can only be imported on websites where sh404SEF is still installed.
importWizard.speedModeCaption: Reduce speed if import fails with timeout errors.

urlEdit.title: Details of
urlEdit.sefCaption: Customize the SEF URL for this page.
urlEdit.createSefCaption: Enter a SEF URL to create a new SEF/non-SEF pair.
urlEdit.sefSpec: Should NOT start with a / or include the full domain. No space or other special symbols. Example: a-customized/address/for-a-page.
urlEdit.nonSefCaption: Enter a non-SEF URL associated with the new SEF you want to create.
urlEdit.customizeDuplicatesCaption: If enabled, any duplicate URL of the current URL will be customized in the same way, as well as variants such as paginated versions.

duplicates.editPageTitle: This page has multiple non-SEF URLs pointing at it.
duplicates.editPageMessage: 4SEF grouped them under the same SEF URL. Current non-sef used for this SEF is: %1
duplicates.makeMainSuccessDetails: Now using %1 non-sef when %2 is requested.

urls.confirmPurge: Please confirm you want to delete all automatically created URLs.
urls.confirmPurgeDetails: Manually customized URLs will be retained. Other URLs will be re-created automatically when needed to display pages of the website.
urls.deleteWithDupDetails: Duplicates of the deleted URLs will also be deleted.

stats.enabledPerUrlCaption: If set to Yes, the number of times each individual URL is rendered will be counted.
stats.enabledPerDayCaption: If set to Yes, the number of URLs rendered each day will be counted.
stats.resultsOnDashboard: Results are displayed on the dashboard.
stats.deleteAllDataConfirm: you want to clear all statistics
stats.resetDataCaption: Delete all hits counter collected until now. You will be prompted for a confirmation before deletion happens.
stats.dataReset: All statistics data has been deleted.
